name: write_chipscope_archive
full_help:
write_chipscope_archive

Description: 
chipscope container

Syntax: 
write_chipscope_archive  [-rp <arg>] [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
name of the output file

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-rp]       rp name
  [-force]    Overwrite existing file
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      container file name

Categories: 
FileIO, Debug

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
